resources.string: To run hermes-agent locally on Android, install Termux and Termux:API from F-Droid. Then return to Hermes to continue.
Or get it from GitHub Releases

Hermes needs four things from your Termux install before the local install can run. Do these in order, then tap Retry:

1. Install Termux and (recommended) Termux:API from F-Droid. Termux:API powers the battery / sensor / telephony features Hermes uses after install.

2. Grant the “Run commands inside Termux environment” permission: tap Open App Settings → Additional permissions → enable it.

3. In Termux, enable external apps: long-press the Termux screen → Properties → toggle “allow-external-apps” (or run `echo allow-external-apps=true >> ~/.termux/termux.properties` then `termux-reload-settings`).

4. Return to Hermes and tap Retry.
